description: Perform an action as a Sim (move, interact, speak, cancel, or inventory management)

args.name: x
args.description: Position x in 1/16 tile units (for goto, place-inventory)

args.name: y
args.description: Position y in 1/16 tile units (for goto, place-inventory)

args.name: object_persist_id
args.description: PersistID of the lot object to move to inventory (for send-to-inventory) or inventory item to place on lot (for place-inventory)

args.name: guid
args.description: Catalog GUID of the inventory item (required for place-inventory)

args.name: dir
args.description: Direction byte: NORTH=1, EAST=4, SOUTH=16, WEST=64 (for place-inventory)

args.name: request_id
args.description: Correlation ID for response matching (recommended for update-inventory)
